Guys, we got a look at the facility in early June 2026. A beautiful monument stands in the center of the square. Unfortunately, the repair work did not make a good look. 
We recommend it in general!
Although, of course, it's up to you...
The Pioneer Monument is strategically placed in the front of City Hall. It’s an elevated statute so really commanding.

This monument has been moved due to some re-design of the Civic Center area.  And it has been changed to cope with new appoaches to California colonial history.  But here it is next to the Asian Art Museum and sometimes in a very troubled area.  Not a great tourist destination.
